subcodes.first_line: A mention from Our presence unto her who, when she heard the call of God, turned with her entire being unto Thee and believed in God, the One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا للتی اذا سمعت ندآء الله اقبلت بکلها الیک و آمنت بالله الفرد
subcodes.subjects: @predictions and prophecies, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @knowledge; recognition of God
